headline: Assessing LKQ (LKQ) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: LKQ stock reacts to ongoing share price weakness LKQ (LKQ) continues to draw attention after a period of weaker share performance, with the stock recently closing at $28.51 and posting negative returns over the day, week, month and past 3 months. See our latest analysis for LKQ. That one day share price decline of 9.72% sits on top of weaker recent momentum, with a 90 day share price return of 13.21% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 24.83%. If LKQ's recent pullback has you rethinking...
